daily.today_energy: Your vibe is grounded but electric today, Cap. There's a quiet confidence brewing beneath the surface—lean into it. The universe is whispering that slow progress is still progress, and your patience is literally your superpower rn.
daily.love: If you're coupled up, your person might need some reassurance that you're invested. If you're solo, someone's noticing your energy shift. Either way, vulnerability isn't weakness—it's literally magnetic today.
daily.career: Your ideas are sharper than usual, and people are actually listening. This is the moment to pitch something you've been sitting on. Trust your gut; it's been doing the heavy lifting behind the scenes.
daily.health: Your body's asking for intentional movement today, not just existing. Whether it's a walk, stretching, or dancing to your fav songs—honor what feels good. Mental clarity follows when you actually feel your physicality.

weekly.overview: This week invites you to soften your edges, Cap. Mercury's doing its thing, stirring up conversations you've been putting off. Trust the momentum—vulnerability is actually your superpower right now.
weekly.love: If you're coupled up, your person might be craving more depth. Single? Someone's noticing your lately vibe shift. Either way, lead with honesty over your usual armor. It hits different.
weekly.career: Your creative energy is *chef's kiss* this week. Ideas you've been sitting on deserve airtime. Don't wait for perfect conditions—just start and iterate. Your boss will notice the shift.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for consistency over intensity. Think grounding routines rather than extreme overhauls. Journaling or a walk where you actually think might serve you better than your usual grind.
